Metadata.Title: CVE-2026-25681 affecting package sriov-network-device-plugin for versions less than 3.7.0-6
Metadata.Description: CVE-2026-25681 affecting package sriov-network-device-plugin for versions less than 3.7.0-6. A patched version of the package is available.
